title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Carbon Steel Baking Tray, Durable Non Stick Coating, Fridge and Freezer Safe, Perfect for Baked Goods and Roasting, 37 cm x 25 cm, Robust Essential Oven pan, Grey
features: FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Baking Tray can store cooked goods in the fridge or freezer; Meaning its ideal for prep and leftovers; Simply take the Baking Tray straight from freezer to oven to cook or reheat ideally every time
NON-STICK: This durable non stick coating will easily remove cooked, grilled and baked foods time and time again; The non stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean handwash recommended, baking tray is ideal for everyday use, can be used for cakes, pastry, oven chips or roasting
IDEAL SIZE: This 37 x 25 x 2 cm and inner size 32.5 x 20.8 x 1.9, non-stick baking tray is the ideal size for most conventional ovens, including electric, gas and ranged cookers
DURABLE: This Chef Aid Oven Tray is robust, and stackable for easy storage
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
